nasb.text: For it is written in the Law of Moses, “You shall not muzzle the ox while he is threshing.” God is not concerned about oxen, is He?

esv.text: For it is written in the Law of Moses, “You shall not muzzle an ox when it treads out the grain.” Is it for oxen that God is concerned?

cnv.text: 就在摩西的律法上記著說：“牛踹穀的時候，不可籠住牠的嘴。”難道　神關心的只是牛嗎？

ccb.text: 摩西的律法书上说：“牛在踩谷时，不可笼住它的嘴。”难道上帝关心的只是牛吗？

csbs.text: 事实上，摩西的律法上记着：“牛踹谷的时候，不可笼住它的嘴。”难道神顾念的是牛吗？
